LanguageData.WB_Giver.label: giver
LanguageData.WB_Giver.description:
The Giver was originally an artificial livestock created by genetically modifying a girl and cultivating it through cloning in order to solve the food problem of a contaminated and barren planet. 
People were greatly helped by these cloned women, but they were treated extremely poorly by the people, and it was not uncommon for them to meet a horrible end.
The genius scientist took pity on the Givers and continued to genetically modify her so that she would be cute, ageless, and hardworking so that people would love her. 
The Giver thus born succeeded in having many useful functions to support colony operations, but her reproductive ability was lost. 
Nowadays, Givers are valuable assets that are very useful for colony management, and are traded at high prices. 
She is a very gentle and hard worker who will support your colony with her warm fur and special milk and herbal tea.
She loves berries and is very happy when given them.
LanguageData.WB_Giver_Berrytart.label: giver's berry tart
LanguageData.WB_Giver.tools.left_hand.label: left hand
LanguageData.WB_Giver.tools.right_hand.label: right hand
LanguageData.WB_Giver_Berrytart.description: A tart made with giver's milk. Please keep refrigerated.
LanguageData.WB_Giver_Herbaltea.label: giver's herbal tea
LanguageData.WB_Giver_Herbaltea.description: Specially prepared herbal tea by giver. It has a recreational effect, provides a 3-day restful sleep effect, and speeds up the healing of injuries and illnesses.\nPlease keep refrigerated.
LanguageData.WB_Giver_Milk.label: giver's milk
LanguageData.WB_Giver_Milk.description: Very delicious giver's milk. Even infants can drink it without worrying about food poisoning. Please keep refrigerated.
LanguageData.WB_Giver_MilkJam.label: giver's milk jam
LanguageData.WB_Giver_MilkJam.description: Jam made with giver's milk. It can be stored for a long time even at room temperature.\nThis meal cannot cause food poisoning due to complete sterilization during cooking.
LanguageData.WB_Giver_Milkshake.label: giver's milkshake
LanguageData.WB_Giver_Milkshake.description: A milkshake made with giver's milk. Please keep refrigerated.This can be stacked at 75 per cell.
LanguageData.WB_Giver_Pancake.label: giver's pancake
LanguageData.WB_Giver_Pancake.description: A pancakes made with giver's milk. Please keep refrigerated.
LanguageData.WB_Giver_Thrumbocookies.label: thrumbocookies
LanguageData.WB_Giver_Thrumbocookies.description: Giant Slambo-shaped cookies made with giver's milk. They can be stored for a long time even at room temperature.
LanguageData.WB_Giver_Milkherbaltea.label: giver's milk herbal tea
LanguageData.WB_Giver_Milkherbaltea.description: Specially prepared herbal tea by giver. It has the same medicinal properties as giver's herbal tea, and in addition, you can also ingest a small amount of hemogen.\nPlease keep refrigerated.
LanguageData.WB_Giver_Wool.label: giver's wool
LanguageData.WB_Giver_Wool.description: Giver's wool is long, warm, and protects you.
LanguageData.WB_Giver_Doll.label: poorly crafted doll
LanguageData.WB_Giver_Berrycompote.label: berry compote
LanguageData.WB_Giver_Berrycompote.description: A compote made by crushing berries and boiling them with sugar. This is giver's favorite food. It can be stored for a long time even at room temperature.\nThis meal cannot cause food poisoning due to complete sterilization during cooking.
LanguageData.WB_Giver_Berrycompotetart.label: giver's berry compote tart
LanguageData.WB_Giver_Berrycompotetart.description: A tart made with giver's milk and berry compote. this is giver's favorite food. Please keep refrigerated.
LanguageData.WB_Giver_Teapot.label: teapot
LanguageData.WB_Giver_Teapot.description: This is the giver's favorite teapot.
LanguageData.WB_Giveracc_Flower.label: flower pin
LanguageData.WB_Giveracc_Flower.description: It's cute and seems to suit the giver.
LanguageData.WB_Giveracc_Thrumbo.label: thrumbo pin
LanguageData.WB_Giveracc_Thrumbo.description: It's cute and seems to suit the giver.
LanguageData.WB_Giveracc_Sunflower.label: sunflower pin
LanguageData.WB_Giveracc_Sunflower.description: It's cute and seems to suit the giver.
LanguageData.WB_Giveracc_Star.label: star pin
LanguageData.WB_Giveracc_Star.description: It's cute and seems to suit the giver.
LanguageData.WB_Giveracc_Snowman.label: snowman pin
LanguageData.WB_Giveracc_Snowman.description: It's cute and seems to suit the giver.
LanguageData.WB_Giveracc_Shell.label: shell pin
LanguageData.WB_Giveracc_Shell.description: It's cute and seems to suit the giver.
LanguageData.WB_Giveracc_RoseWhite.label: rose pin (white)
LanguageData.WB_Giveracc_RoseWhite.description: It's cute and seems to suit the giver.
LanguageData.WB_Giveracc_RosePink.label: rose pin (pink)
LanguageData.WB_Giveracc_RosePink.description: It's cute and seems to suit the giver.
LanguageData.WB_Giveracc_RoseBlue.label: rose pin (blue)
LanguageData.WB_Giveracc_RoseBlue.description: It's cute and seems to suit the giver.(Blue roses are rare)
LanguageData.WB_Giveracc_Rose.label: rose pin (red)
LanguageData.WB_Giveracc_Rose.description: It's cute and seems to suit the giver.
LanguageData.WB_Giveracc_RIM.label: Rimworld pin
LanguageData.WB_Giveracc_RIM.description: It's cute and seems to suit the giver.
LanguageData.WB_Giveracc_RibbonYellow.label: ribbon pin (yellow)
LanguageData.WB_Giveracc_RibbonYellow.description: It's cute and seems to suit the giver.
LanguageData.WB_Giveracc_RibbonWhite.label: ribbon pin (white)
LanguageData.WB_Giveracc_RibbonWhite.description: It's cute and seems to suit the giver.
LanguageData.WB_Giveracc_RibbonRed.label: ribbon pin (red)
LanguageData.WB_Giveracc_RibbonRed.description: It's cute and seems to suit the giver.
LanguageData.WB_Giveracc_RibbonPurple.label: ribbon pin (purple)
LanguageData.WB_Giveracc_RibbonPurple.description: It's cute and seems to suit the giver.
LanguageData.WB_Giveracc_RibbonPink.label: ribbon pin (pink)
LanguageData.WB_Giveracc_RibbonPink.description: It's cute and seems to suit the giver.
LanguageData.WB_Giveracc_RibbonGreen.label: ribbon pin (green)
LanguageData.WB_Giveracc_RibbonGreen.description: It's cute and seems to suit the giver.(Green is the color that represents the giver)
LanguageData.WB_Giveracc_RibbonBlue.label: ribbon pin (blue)
LanguageData.WB_Giveracc_RibbonBlue.description: It's cute and seems to suit the giver.
LanguageData.WB_Giveracc_RibbonBlack.label: ribbon pin (black)
LanguageData.WB_Giveracc_RibbonBlack.description: Maybe it's a little too adult for the giver?
LanguageData.WB_Giveracc_Moon.label: moon pin
LanguageData.WB_Giveracc_Moon.description: It's cute and seems to suit the giver.
LanguageData.WB_Giveracc_Meteor.label: shooting star pin
LanguageData.WB_Giveracc_Meteor.description: It's cute and seems to suit the giver.
LanguageData.WB_Giveracc_Heart.label: heart pin
LanguageData.WB_Giveracc_Heart.description: It's cute and seems to suit the giver.
LanguageData.WB_Giveracc_Glasses.label: fashion glasses
LanguageData.WB_Giveracc_Glasses.description: It's cute and seems to suit the giver.
LanguageData.WB_Giveracc_BigRibbonGreen.label: big ribbon barrette (green)
LanguageData.WB_Giveracc_BigRibbonGreen.description: It's a big green ribbon barrette. Haha, very cute. :)
LanguageData.WB_Giveracc_BigRibbonRed.label: big ribbon barrette (red)
LanguageData.WB_Giveracc_BigRibbonRed.description: A nice big red ribbon barrette. No capable of flying.
LanguageData.WB_Filth_Floordrawing.label: floordrawing
LanguageData.WB_Apparel_MaidOutfit.label: giver’s maid outfit
LanguageData.WB_Apparel_MaidOutfit.description: A cute maid outfit matching with Giver.
LanguageData.WB_Apparel_MaidHeaddress.label: giver’s maid headdress
LanguageData.WB_Apparel_MaidHeaddress.description: A cute maid headdress matching with Giver.
LanguageData.WB_Apparel_MaidHeaddressWithWig.label: giver’s maid headdress(wigged)
LanguageData.WB_Apparel_MaidHeaddressWithWig.descript: A cute maid headdress matching with Giver, with a wig included.
